working_on.task: Completed M3 UI Revamp and Progress Logic
working_on.notes: Full visual upgrade to Material 3. Implemented absolute progress tracking in TtsService using onRangeStart. Connected to MainActivity via LocalBroadcast (ACTION_PROGRESS). Verified build SUCCESS.

pending_tasks.task: Test progress tracking with extremely long texts (>10k chars)
Optimize TTS chunking to avoid punctuation splits in middle of progress broadcast

recent_changes.description: Material 3 Migration: Dark theme, cards, and buttons updated to M3 standards.
Reading Progress: Added LinearProgressIndicator and logic to track TTS position.

errors_encountered.error: Missing ic_volume_up and incorrect M3 style names caused build failure
errors_encountered.solution: Created vector asset and corrected style to Widget.Material3.Button.TonalButton

decisions_made.reason: CumulativeOffset + CurrentChunkOffset allows tracking progress even when text is split into chunks.
Aligning with modern Android UX standards for premium look and feel.
